extraction.one_line_summary: KUSS Sepp won from 6-minute breakaway on Alto de Javalambre after MARTINEZ Lenny's Groupama-FDJ teammates paced him into virtual GC lead.
tactical_patterns: SOLÉR Marc took 6-second intermediate sprint bonus in breakaway to secure virtual lead, revealing Movistar's bonus-hunting calculus.
Groupama-FDJ planted MARTINEZ with two strong domestiques (Mas, Store) in 40km breakaway, executing perfect GC ambush via break.
Jumbo-Visma allowed 6+ minute gap with SOLER/LANDA/MARTINEZ present, prioritizing EVENEPOEL jersey loss over stage control.
KUSS dropped BUCHMANN 2 miles from finish, exposing Bora's twin-leader strategy failure when both candidates cracked early.

rider_signals.VINES Jay: negative: crashed out of race in high-speed early pile-up, massive UAE GC support loss
rider_signals.BAJOL Rémi: negative: crashed out, removing Evenepoel's critical mountain lieutenant before hardest stages arrive
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: recovered 10 seconds in final 2km after going 40 seconds down, rode within limits unlike competitors
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Lenny: positive: 20-year-old took red jersey via breakaway, team committed two strong climbers to escort him
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: negative: dropped 2 miles from summit finish despite being Bora's co-leader, far too early to crack
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: won at 2000m altitude finish after Tour domestique duties, high-altitude specialist thrives when given freedom
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: gained significant time on Evenepoel without working, moved up GC while Jumbo avoided jersey responsibility
